name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We've traveled to 5 countries together and she's the first person I call when something big happens.

name: James Okafor
bio: Senior engineer who mentored me in my first job. We grab coffee every few weeks and he always has great career advice.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Grew up three houses down. Our families had Sunday dinners together for years. Now we're both in different cities but stay close.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Workout buddy from college who's now training for marathons. Always motivating and we push each other to be better.

name: Elena Vasquez
bio: Fellow bookworm and co-founder of our little book club. We share recommendations constantly and have matching annotated copies of Middlemarch.

name: David Chen
bio: Co-founder of a startup I almost joined. We stayed connected and bounce ideas off each other regularly. Sharp thinker.

name: Aisha Johnson
bio: Best friend since middle school. Life took us to different coasts but some friendships just never fade. Need to catch up badly.

name: Tom Eriksson
bio: Met on a solo trip through Scandinavia. We've done two more trips since. The kind of friend who makes any adventure better.
